series_metadata.series_description: The Ohio Compliance Supplement lists local government laws and regulations the Auditor of State deems potentially material per Government Auditing Standards paragraphs 4.10 and 4.28 and also lists suggested audit procedures to test for compliance with these requirements. The Ohio Compliance Supplement also lists other laws and regulations (and the related audit testing requirements) that while usually not material, the Auditor of State deems important to Ohio governments in fulfilling their stewardship responsibilities.
